process_route: chemical vapor infiltration; melt infiltration; polymer infiltration and pyrolysis variants
known_strengths: high temperature capability; damage tolerance versus monolithic ceramics; reduced density versus superalloys
known_watch_outs: EBC durability; fiber oxidation; interphase recession; inspection and repair complexity
applicability_guardrails: Use as an anchor reference for hot-section ceramic matrix composite systems with explicit environmental barrier assumptions.

known_strengths: oxidation tolerance; simpler environmental compatibility than SiC systems
known_watch_outs: lower temperature ceiling and creep capability than SiC/SiC; matrix cracking and fiber architecture sensitivity
applicability_guardrails: Use as a comparison system where oxidation tolerance is prioritized over maximum temperature capability.
